text: First journal entry, a little scary I'm not gonna lie. I'm almost done with this project just need to put on the finishing touches and I really think she's gonna like it. We went through a rough patch but I think we're back on track. Maybe she's still a little mad at me but I know she still loves me and I still love her. I'm not giving up on us yet and I hope to god that she doesn't either.

AHHHHH SPAIN WONNNNNN!!!! Anyways, I was very happy when she called me today and showed me her jewlery and her nails and wanted to see my almost clean shaved face. That was nice. Very unexpected. I wanna go see her, being at home is lame. I should be in westhampton, stupid.

Today was a good day, I still miss my girlfriend. This project is officially finished and I can give it to her tomorrow which makes me very happy. I'll probably add more to it in the future or change the songs on Side B, but for now I'm very happy. But I'm sad that my girlfriend is sad and I don't know how to fix it, or that she'll tell me how to fix it, or if I even can. I guess it'll just take time.
